WITH carcinogenic_molecules AS (     SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT m.molecule_id) AS total_carcinogenic     FROM molecule m     WHERE m.label LIKE '%carcinogenic%' ), molecules_without_fluorine AS (     SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT m.molecule_id) AS total_without_fluorine     FROM molecule m     LEFT JOIN atom a ON m.molecule_id = a.molecule_id     WHERE m.label LIKE '%carcinogenic%'     GROUP BY m.molecule_id     HAVING SUM(CASE WHEN a.element = 'F' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) = 0 ) SELECT      (CAST(m.total_without_fluorine AS FLOAT) / CAST(c.total_carcinogenic AS FLOAT)) * 100 AS percentage_without_fluorine FROM carcinogenic_molecules c, molecules_without_fluorine m	----- bird -----	toxicology

SELECT      (COUNT(DISTINCT m.molecule_id) * 100.0 / (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT m2.molecule_id) FROM molecule m2      JOIN bond b2 ON m2.molecule_id = b2.molecule_id WHERE b2.bond_type = 'triple')) AS carcinogenic_percentage FROM      molecule m JOIN      bond b ON m.molecule_id = b.molecule_id WHERE      b.bond_type = 'triple' AND m.label LIKE '%carcinogenic%'	----- bird -----	toxicology
SELECT DISTINCT element  FROM atom  WHERE molecule_id = (SELECT molecule_id FROM molecule WHERE label = 'TR000')  ORDER BY element  LIMIT 3	----- bird -----	toxicology

SELECT      (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM molecule WHERE label LIKE '%carcinogenic%') -      (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM molecule WHERE label NOT LIKE '%carcinogenic%') AS difference	----- bird -----	toxicology
SELECT atom_id, atom_id2 FROM connected WHERE bond_id = 'TR000_2_5'	----- bird -----	toxicology
SELECT bond_id FROM connected WHERE atom_id2 = 'TR000_2'	----- bird -----	toxicology

WITH bond_counts AS (     SELECT          COUNT(*) AS total_bonds,         SUM(CASE WHEN bond_type = 'double' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS double_bonds     FROM bond     WHERE molecule_id = 'TR008' ) SELECT      ROUND((double_bonds * 100.0 / total_bonds), 5) AS percentage_double_bonds FROM bond_counts	----- bird -----	toxicology
SELECT ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN label LIKE '%carcinogenic%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*), 0), 3) AS carcinogenic_percentage FROM molecule	----- bird -----	toxicology

WITH total_hydrogen AS (     SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_count     FROM atom     WHERE molecule_id = 'TR206' AND element = 'H' ), accounted_hydrogen AS (     SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT c.atom_id) AS accounted_count     FROM connected c     JOIN atom a ON c.atom_id = a.atom_id     WHERE a.molecule_id = 'TR206' AND a.element = 'H' ) SELECT      COALESCE((CAST(accounted_count AS REAL) / CAST(total_count AS REAL)) * 100, 0) AS percentage FROM total_hydrogen, accounted_hydrogen	----- bird -----	toxicology

SELECT DISTINCT a.element FROM atom a JOIN bond b ON a.molecule_id = b.molecule_id WHERE b.bond_type = 'double' AND a.molecule_id = 'TR024'	----- bird -----	toxicology

SELECT m.label, COUNT(a.atom_id) AS atom_count FROM molecule m JOIN atom a ON m.molecule_id = a.molecule_id JOIN bond b ON m.molecule_id = b.molecule_id WHERE b.bond_type = 'carcinogenic' GROUP BY m.label ORDER BY atom_count DESC LIMIT 1	----- bird -----	toxicology

SELECT      (COUNT(DISTINCT m.molecule_id) * 100.0 / (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT molecule_id) FROM molecule)) AS carcinogenic_percentage FROM      molecule m JOIN      bond b ON m.molecule_id = b.molecule_id JOIN      connected c ON b.bond_id = c.bond_id WHERE      b.bond_type = 'triple' AND      (SELECT element FROM atom WHERE atom_id = c.atom_id) = 'H' AND      m.label LIKE '%carcinogenic%'	----- bird -----	toxicology
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT molecule_id) AS carcinogenic_molecule_count FROM molecule WHERE label LIKE '%carcinogenic%'	----- bird -----	toxicology

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT b.molecule_id) AS single_bond_molecule_count FROM bond b JOIN molecule m ON b.molecule_id = m.molecule_id WHERE m.label BETWEEN 'TR004' AND 'TR010' AND b.bond_type = 'single'	----- bird -----	toxicology
SELECT COUNT(*) AS carbon_count  FROM atom  WHERE molecule_id = 'TR008' AND element = 'C'	----- bird -----	toxicology
SELECT a.element  FROM atom a  JOIN molecule m ON a.molecule_id = m.molecule_id  WHERE a.atom_id = 'TR004_7' AND m.label NOT LIKE '%carcinogenic%'	----- bird -----	toxicology

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT m.molecule_id) AS total_molecules FROM molecule m JOIN bond b ON m.molecule_id = b.molecule_id JOIN connected c ON b.bond_id = c.bond_id JOIN atom a1 ON c.atom_id = a1.atom_id JOIN atom a2 ON c.atom_id2 = a2.atom_id WHERE b.bond_type = 'double' AND        ((a1.element = 'O' AND a2.element != 'O') OR         (a2.element = 'O' AND a1.element != 'O'))	----- bird -----	toxicology

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT m.molecule_id) AS non_carcinogenic_triple_bond_molecules FROM molecule m JOIN bond b ON m.molecule_id = b.molecule_id WHERE b.bond_type = 'triple' AND m.label NOT LIKE '%carcinogenic%'	----- bird -----	toxicology
SELECT a.element, b.bond_type  FROM atom a  JOIN connected c ON a.atom_id = c.atom_id  JOIN bond b ON c.bond_id = b.bond_id  WHERE a.molecule_id = 'TR002'	----- bird -----	toxicology
SELECT a.atom_id  FROM atom a  JOIN bond b ON a.molecule_id = b.molecule_id  WHERE b.bond_type = 'double' AND a.element = 'C' AND a.molecule_id = 'TR012'	----- bird -----	toxicology

SELECT a.atom_id  FROM atom a  JOIN molecule m ON a.molecule_id = m.molecule_id  JOIN bond b ON m.molecule_id = b.molecule_id  WHERE a.element = 'O' AND m.label LIKE '%carcinogenic%'	----- bird -----	toxicology

WITH champion AS (     SELECT d.driverId, r.resultId, r.time, r.position     FROM results r     JOIN races ra ON r.raceId = ra.raceId     JOIN driverStandings ds ON r.driverId = ds.driverId     JOIN drivers d ON r.driverId = d.driverId     WHERE ra.year = 2008 AND ra.name = 'Australian Grand Prix' AND ds.position = 1 ), last_place AS (     SELECT d.driverId, r.resultId, r.time, r.position     FROM results r     JOIN races ra ON r.raceId = ra.raceId     JOIN drivers d ON r.driverId = d.driverId     WHERE ra.year = 2008 AND ra.name = 'Australian Grand Prix' AND r.position = (SELECT MAX(position) FROM results WHERE raceId = r.raceId) ) SELECT      (CAST(last.time AS INTEGER) - CAST(champion.time AS INTEGER)) * 100.0 / CAST(last.time AS INTEGER) AS percentage_faster FROM champion, last_place last	----- bird -----	formula_1

SELECT AVG(strftime('%Y', '1999-01-01') - strftime('%Y', Birthday)) AS Average_Age FROM Patient WHERE ID IN (     SELECT DISTINCT ID     FROM Laboratory     WHERE Date BETWEEN '1991-10-01' AND '1991-10-31' )	----- bird -----	thrombosis_prediction

WITH AnnualConsumption AS (     SELECT          c.Segment,         AVG(ym.Consumption) AS AvgConsumption     FROM          yearmonth ym     JOIN          customers c ON ym.CustomerID = c.CustomerID     WHERE          c.Currency = 'CZK' AND          strftime('%Y', ym.Date) = '2013'     GROUP BY          c.CustomerID, c.Segment ), MinConsumption AS (     SELECT          Segment,         MIN(AvgConsumption) AS MinAvgConsumption     FROM          AnnualConsumption     GROUP BY          Segment ) SELECT      a.Segment AS Segment1,     b.Segment AS Segment2,     (b.MinAvgConsumption - a.MinAvgConsumption) AS ConsumptionDifference FROM      MinConsumption a JOIN      MinConsumption b ON          (a.Segment = 'SME' AND b.Segment = 'LAM') OR          (a.Segment = 'LAM' AND b.Segment = 'KAM') OR          (a.Segment = 'KAM' AND b.Segment = 'SME')	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing

WITH ConsumptionBySegment AS (     SELECT          c.Segment,         strftime('%Y', ym.Date) AS Year,         SUM(ym.Consumption) AS TotalConsumption     FROM          customers c     JOIN          yearmonth ym ON c.CustomerID = ym.CustomerID     WHERE          c.Currency = 'EUR' AND          strftime('%Y', ym.Date) IN ('2012', '2013')     GROUP BY          c.Segment, Year ), ConsumptionChange AS (     SELECT          Segment,         SUM(CASE WHEN Year = '2013' THEN TotalConsumption ELSE 0 END) AS Consumption2013,         SUM(CASE WHEN Year = '2012' THEN TotalConsumption ELSE 0 END) AS Consumption2012     FROM          ConsumptionBySegment     GROUP BY          Segment ) SELECT      Segment,     ((Consumption2013 - Consumption2012) / NULLIF(Consumption2012, 0)) * 100 AS PercentageIncrease FROM      ConsumptionChange WHERE      Consumption2012 > 0 ORDER BY      PercentageIncrease ASC	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing

SELECT c.Currency  FROM transactions_1k t  JOIN customers c ON t.CustomerID = c.CustomerID  WHERE t.Amount = 548.4 AND t.Date = '2012-08-24'	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing

SELECT      (COUNT(DISTINCT c.CustomerID) * 100.0 / (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT CustomerID) FROM customers)) AS Percentage FROM      customers c JOIN      yearmonth ym ON c.CustomerID = ym.CustomerID WHERE      c.Currency = 'EUR' AND ym.Date = '2012-08-25'	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing

WITH Consumption2012 AS (     SELECT SUM(Consumption) AS TotalConsumption     FROM yearmonth     WHERE strftime('%Y', Date) = '2012' AND CustomerID IN (         SELECT CustomerID         FROM transactions_1k         WHERE Date = '2012-08-25' AND Amount = 634.8     ) ), Consumption2013 AS (     SELECT SUM(Consumption) AS TotalConsumption     FROM yearmonth     WHERE strftime('%Y', Date) = '2013' AND CustomerID IN (         SELECT CustomerID         FROM transactions_1k         WHERE Date = '2012-08-25' AND Amount = 634.8     ) ) SELECT      (Consumption2012.TotalConsumption - Consumption2013.TotalConsumption) / Consumption2012.TotalConsumption AS ConsumptionDecreaseRate FROM Consumption2012, Consumption2013	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing

SELECT gs.GasStationID, SUM(t.Amount * t.Price) AS Revenue FROM gasstations gs JOIN transactions_1k t ON gs.GasStationID = t.GasStationID GROUP BY gs.GasStationID ORDER BY Revenue DESC LIMIT 1	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing

SELECT      (SUM(CASE WHEN c.Segment = 'premium' THEN y.Consumption ELSE 0 END) /       SUM(y.Consumption)) * 100 AS PremiumPercentage FROM      yearmonth y JOIN      customers c ON y.CustomerID = c.CustomerID JOIN      gasstations g ON y.GasStationID = g.GasStationID WHERE      g.Country = 'SVK'	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing

SELECT      SUM(t.Amount * t.Price) AS TotalSpent,     SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y-%m', t.Date) = '2012-01' THEN t.Amount * t.Price ELSE 0 END) AS SpentInJanuary2012 FROM      transactions_1k t WHERE      t.CustomerID = 38508	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing

SELECT p.Description, SUM(t.Amount) AS TotalSold FROM products p JOIN transactions_1k t ON p.ProductID = t.ProductID GROUP BY p.ProductID ORDER BY TotalSold DESC LIMIT 5	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing

SELECT c.CustomerID, AVG(t.Price) AS AveragePrice, c.Currency FROM customers c JOIN transactions_1k t ON c.CustomerID = t.CustomerID GROUP BY c.CustomerID ORDER BY SUM(t.Price * t.Amount) DESC LIMIT 1	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing
SELECT g.Country FROM gasstations g JOIN transactions_1k t ON g.GasStationID = t.GasStationID WHERE t.ProductID = 2 ORDER BY t.Price DESC LIMIT 1	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing

SELECT c.CustomerID, y.Consumption FROM transactions_1k t JOIN customers c ON t.CustomerID = c.CustomerID JOIN yearmonth y ON c.CustomerID = y.CustomerID WHERE t.ProductID = 5 AND t.Price > 29.00 AND y.Date LIKE '2012-08%'	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing
